metadata.description: A disciplined AI pair-programming companion for Claude Code: one steering document plus a tiny enforced core, so Claude queues work, decides with brutal-honest recommendations against a requirements ledger, and keeps your code clean — automatically, with almost no setup.

plugins.name: companion
plugins.description: How Claude works on your project, in one place. A steering document (put in context once per session) defines how Claude turns your requests into a live task queue, decides with brutally honest multiple-choice recommendations that name what each option would change, runs autonomously when you step away, and keeps code clean as it changes it. A tiny enforced core backs it: a secret-scan that blocks committed credentials, cross-session task resume, and a task-queue fallback for the newest models where Claude's built-in task tracking is switched off.
